subject: Son Goku in Super Saiyan Blue form, standing in fighting stance with energy aura active
suspected_ip: Son Goku (Dragon Ball Super) — Super Saiyan Blue form
description: A figure with upswept blue-tinted spiky hair stands in a confident fighting stance against a bright explosive background of yellow and white energy streaks. The figure wears an orange-and-dark outfit typical of the character and is shown from roughly the waist up. Their expression is focused and composed rather than raging — a calm determination. Energy radiates outward behind them in diagonal streaks of gold and white.
foreground: figure with blue spiky hair in fighting stance, orange-dark outfit, calm expression
background: explosive energy streaks, bright yellow-white light
emotion: focused determination, controlled power, composed combat readiness
